Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3010 0 0}Hey. It's not often that you ask to meet like this. So, what is this store?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}The staff said, "This treatment will help you face your inner self"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3140 0 0}Well, you never know till you try. I'll give it a go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, that's fine with me. I'll face my inner self for sure this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3112 0 0}...I didn't realize that I fell asleep until I woke up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I feel rejuvenated, but... I don't feel like I fully faced my inner self...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3023 0 0}...Well, while I'm feeling good, I might as well get a quick run in. All right, I'm off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3048 0 0}...I failed again. I slept through the whole thing this time too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}But I'm feeling pretty good for some reason. I better take advantage of this and get to training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3023 0 0}I'm gonna head off and jog home. I'll see you later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost nighttime... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting late... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
